---
title: "Data integration EpiClim F0 Adults liver"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Summary

This script was used to integrate pathways enrichment results from both lipidomics, metabolomics and transcriptomics results of the EpiClim project (F0 generation, adult liver samples).

## Data input#

```{r load_metabo-lipidomics_data, warning =FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)

# Upload CSV with enriched pathways (from working directory)
metabo <- read.csv2("EPICLIM_F0_Liver_Pathway_Metabolite_Female.csv")

lipido <- read.csv2("EPICLIM_F0_Liver_Pathway_lipid_Female.csv")

# Check data
cat("Métabolomique:", nrow(metabo), "lignes,", ncol(metabo), "colonnes\n")
cat("Lipidomique:", nrow(lipido), "lignes,", ncol(lipido), "colonnes\n")
cat("\nColonnes:\n")
print(colnames(metabo))
```

```{r load_transcriptomics_data}
load("C:/Users/mnft/Desktop/Transcripto/epiclim_analysis.RData")
kegg_list <- readRDS(file.path(getwd(), "kegg_list_LOCKED.rds"))

# Check
sapply(kegg_list, function(x) if (is.null(x)) 0 else nrow(x))

# Build the transcriptomic table
transcripto_sig <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(kegg_list), function(cond) {
  g <- kegg_list[[cond]]
  if (is.null(g) || nrow(g) == 0) return(NULL)
  df <- as.data.frame(g)
  df$Condition <- cond
  df[, c("Description", "Condition")]
})) %>%
  rename(Pathway = Description) %>%
  mutate(omics = "Transcriptomics")

# Filtrer "Global and overview maps" comme dans Figure 3C
if (exists("kegg_combined")) {
  transcripto_sig <- transcripto_sig %>%
    left_join(kegg_combined %>% 
                select(Description, category_B) %>% 
                distinct(),
              by = c("Pathway" = "Description")) %>%
    filter(is.na(category_B) | category_B != "Global and overview maps") %>%
    select(-category_B)
}
```

## Data filtering

```{r filter_omics_pathways}
# Convertir P_Gamma en numérique
metabo$P_Gamma <- as.numeric(as.character(metabo$P_Gamma))
lipido$P_Gamma <- as.numeric(as.character(lipido$P_Gamma))

# Filtre Mummichog standard, females uniquement
metabo_sig <- metabo %>%
  filter(P_Gamma < 0.05,
         Hits_sig >= 3) %>%
  dplyr::select(Pathway, Condition) %>%
  mutate(omics = "Metabolomics")

lipido_sig <- lipido %>%
  filter(P_Gamma < 0.05,
         Hits_sig >= 3) %>%
  dplyr::select(Pathway, Condition) %>%
  mutate(omics = "Lipidomics")

# Vérifier les comptages par condition
cat("=== Métabolomique (femelles, P_Gamma<0.05, Hits_sig>=3) ===\n")
print(table(metabo_sig$Condition))

cat("\n=== Lipidomique (femelles, P_Gamma<0.05, Hits_sig>=3) ===\n")
print(table(lipido_sig$Condition))
```

## Data integration

```{r combine_omcs}
# Combined the 3 tables
all_omics <- bind_rows(transcripto_sig, metabo_sig, lipido_sig)

# Use the same name for the triple combinaison ("APT" and "AcidPFOSTemp")
all_omics <- all_omics %>%
  mutate(Condition = case_when(
    Condition == "AcidPFOSTemp" ~ "APT",
    TRUE ~ Condition
  ))

# Check the output
cat("Total entries (pathway × condition × omics):", nrow(all_omics), "\n")
cat("\nDistribution per omic layer:\n")
print(table(all_omics$omics))
cat("\nDistribution per condition:\n")
print(table(all_omics$Condition))
```

```{r pathway_category_mapping}
# Look at all unique pathways 
all_unique_pathways <- sort(unique(all_omics$Pathway))
print(all_unique_pathways)

# Names normalization before mapping
all_omics <- all_omics %>%
  mutate(Pathway_clean = str_to_lower(Pathway),
         Pathway_clean = str_replace_all(Pathway_clean, "-", " "),
         Pathway_clean = str_squish(Pathway_clean))

# Check again
all_unique_pathways <- sort(unique(all_omics$Pathway_clean))
print(all_unique_pathways)

pathway_category <- tribble(
  ~Pathway_clean, ~category,
    # ---- Carbohydrate metabolism ----
  "starch and sucrose metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "galactose metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "pentose and glucuronate interconversions", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "pentose phosphate pathway", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "fructose and mannose metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "hexose phosphorylation", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "glycolysis / gluconeogenesis", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "glycolysis and gluconeogenesis", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "pyruvate metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "ascorbate and aldarate metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "amino sugar and nucleotide sugar metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "aminosugars metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "biosynthesis of nucleotide sugars", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "biosynthesis of various nucleotide sugars", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "tca cycle", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "citrate cycle (tca cycle)", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "glyoxylate and dicarboxylate metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "butanoate metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "propanoate metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  "carbon metabolism", "Carbohydrate metabolism",
  
  # ---- Energy metabolism ----
  "oxidative phosphorylation", "Energy metabolism",
  "nitrogen metabolism", "Energy metabolism",
  "sulfur metabolism", "Energy metabolism",
  
  # ---- Glycan biosynthesis & metabolism ----
  "n glycan biosynthesis", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "various types of n glycan biosynthesis", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "n glycan degradation", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "other types of o glycan biosynthesis", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "sialic acid metabolism", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "glycosphingolipid metabolism", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "glycosphingolipid biosynthesis ganglioseries", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "glycosphingolipid biosynthesis globoseries", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "glycosphingolipid biosynthesis globo and isoglobo series", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "glycosphingolipid biosynthesis lacto and neolacto series", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "keratan sulfate degradation", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "chondroitin sulfate degradation", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "glycosaminoglycan biosynthesis keratan sulfate", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "glycosylphosphatidylinositol (gpi) anchor biosynthesis", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  "o glycan biosynthesis", "Glycan biosynthesis",
  
  # ---- Lipid metabolism ----
  "primary bile acid biosynthesis", "Lipid metabolism",
  "bile acid biosynthesis", "Lipid metabolism",
  "steroid biosynthesis", "Lipid metabolism",
  "steroid hormone biosynthesis", "Lipid metabolism",
  "c21 steroid hormone biosynthesis and metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "androgen and estrogen biosynthesis and metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "glycerolipid metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "glycerophospholipid metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "phosphatidylinositol phosphate metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "inositol phosphate metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "fatty acid metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "fatty acid activation", "Lipid metabolism",
  "fatty acid degradation", "Lipid metabolism",
  "fatty acid elongation", "Lipid metabolism",
  "de novo fatty acid biosynthesis", "Lipid metabolism",
  "biosynthesis of unsaturated fatty acids", "Lipid metabolism",
  "arachidonic acid metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "alpha linolenic acid metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "linoleic acid metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "linoleate metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "omega 3 fatty acid metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "leukotriene metabolism", "Lipid metabolism",
  "prostaglandin formation from arachidonate", "Lipid metabolism",
  "squalene and cholesterol biosynthesis", "Lipid metabolism",
  "saturated fatty acids beta oxidation", "Lipid metabolism",
  
  # ---- Amino acid metabolism ----
  "glycine, serine and threonine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "glycine serine alanine and threonine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "alanine and aspartate metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "alanine, aspartate and glutamate metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "aspartate and asparagine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "cysteine and methionine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "methionine and cysteine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "arginine and proline metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "arginine biosynthesis", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "tryptophan metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "tyrosine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "phenylalanine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "histidine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "beta alanine metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "valine, leucine and isoleucine degradation", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "valine leucine and isoleucine degradation", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "urea cycle/amino group metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "selenoamino acid metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "selenocompound metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "glutathione metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "biosynthesis of amino acids", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "2 oxocarboxylic acid metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  "glutamate metabolism", "Amino acid metabolism",
  
  # ---- Nucleotide metabolism ----
  "purine metabolism", "Nucleotide metabolism",
  "pyrimidine metabolism", "Nucleotide metabolism",
  "nucleotide metabolism", "Nucleotide metabolism",
  
  # ---- Cofactors and vitamins ----
  "one carbon pool by folate", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "folate biosynthesis", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "folate transport and metabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "retinol metabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "vitamin a (retinol) metabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "thiamine metabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "vitamin b1 (thiamin) metabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "pantothenate and coa biosynthesis", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "lipoic acid metabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "porphyrin metabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "ubiquinone and other terpenoid quinone biosynthesis", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "biosynthesis of cofactors", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "vitamin b5 coa biosynthesis from pantothenate", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "coa catabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  "biopterin metabolism", "Cofactors & vitamins",
  
  # ---- Xenobiotic metabolism ----
  "drug metabolism cytochrome p450", "Xenobiotic metabolism",
  "drug metabolism other enzymes", "Xenobiotic metabolism",
  "metabolism of xenobiotics by cytochrome p450", "Xenobiotic metabolism",
  "xenobiotics metabolism", "Xenobiotic metabolism",
  
  # ---- Signal transduction ----
  "wnt signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "mtor signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "hedgehog signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "ppar signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "foxo signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "p53 signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "vegf signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "erbb signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "apelin signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "phosphatidylinositol signaling system", "Signal transduction",
  "hormone signaling", "Signal transduction",
  "adipocytokine signaling pathway", "Signal transduction",
  "cadherin signaling", "Signal transduction",
  "integrin signaling", "Signal transduction",
  "igsf cam signaling", "Signal transduction",
  
  # ---- Protein homeostasis ----
  "proteasome", "Protein homeostasis",
  "protein export", "Protein homeostasis",
  "protein processing in endoplasmic reticulum", "Protein homeostasis",
  "ribosome", "Protein homeostasis",
  "ribosome biogenesis in eukaryotes", "Protein homeostasis",
  "aminoacyl trna biosynthesis", "Protein homeostasis",
  "ubiquitin mediated proteolysis", "Protein homeostasis",
  "rna degradation", "Protein homeostasis",
  "mrna surveillance pathway", "Protein homeostasis",
  
  # ---- Transcription / DNA ----
  "rna polymerase", "Transcription & DNA",
  "spliceosome", "Transcription & DNA",
  "basal transcription factors", "Transcription & DNA",
  "atp dependent chromatin remodeling", "Transcription & DNA",
  "polycomb repressive complex", "Transcription & DNA",
  "dna replication", "Transcription & DNA",
  "base excision repair", "Transcription & DNA",
  "nucleotide excision repair", "Transcription & DNA",
  "mismatch repair", "Transcription & DNA",
  "homologous recombination", "Transcription & DNA",
  "fanconi anemia pathway", "Transcription & DNA",
  
  # ---- Cellular processes (cell cycle, death, motility) ----
  "cell cycle", "Cellular processes",
  "ferroptosis", "Cellular processes",
  "necroptosis", "Cellular processes",
  "autophagy animal", "Cellular processes",
  "autophagy other", "Cellular processes",
  "mitophagy animal", "Cellular processes",
  "efferocytosis", "Cellular processes",
  "peroxisome", "Cellular processes",
  "phagosome", "Cellular processes",
  "cornified envelope formation", "Cellular processes",
  "progesterone mediated oocyte maturation", "Cellular processes",
  "regulation of actin cytoskeleton", "Cellular processes",
  "cytoskeleton in muscle cells", "Cellular processes",
  "motor proteins", "Cellular processes",
  "focal adhesion", "Cellular processes",
  "adherens junction", "Cellular processes",
  "tight junction", "Cellular processes",
  "ecm receptor interaction", "Cellular processes",
  "cell adhesion molecule (cam) interaction", "Cellular processes",
  "neuroactive ligand receptor interaction", "Cellular processes",
  "cytokine cytokine receptor interaction", "Cellular processes",
  "snare interactions in vesicular transport", "Cellular processes",
  "nucleocytoplasmic transport", "Cellular processes",
  
  # ---- Immunity / infection / disease ----
  "salmonella infection", "Immunity & infection",
  "bacterial invasion of epithelial cells", "Immunity & infection",
  "herpes simplex virus 1 infection", "Immunity & infection",
  "viral life cycle hiv 1", "Immunity & infection",
  "virion hepatitis viruses", "Immunity & infection",
  "virion lassa virus and sfts virus", "Immunity & infection",
  "intestinal immune network for iga production", "Immunity & infection",
  "toll like receptor signaling pathway", "Immunity & infection",
  "nod like receptor signaling pathway", "Immunity & infection",
  "cytosolic dna sensing pathway", "Immunity & infection",
  
  # ---- Other ----
  "cardiac muscle contraction", "Other",
  "melanogenesis", "Other",
  "phototransduction", "Other",
  "terpenoid backbone biosynthesis", "Other",
  "alkaloid biosynthesis ii", "Other",
  "putative anti inflammatory metabolites formation from epa", "Other"
)

cat("Total pathways mapped:", nrow(pathway_category), "\n")
unmapped <- setdiff(unique(all_omics$Pathway_clean), pathway_category$Pathway_clean)
cat("Pathways non mappés:", length(unmapped), "\n")
if (length(unmapped) > 0) print(unmapped)
cat("Categories:", length(unique(pathway_category$category)), "\n\n")
print(table(pathway_category$category))

cat("Catégories définies:", length(unique(pathway_category$category)), "\n")
print(table(pathway_category$category))
```

```{r join_categories}
# Join all_omics with pathway_category
all_omics_categorized <- all_omics %>%
  left_join(pathway_category, by = "Pathway_clean")

# Build the counting table: Condition × Category × Omics
counts_table <- all_omics_categorized %>%
  count(Condition, omics, category, name = "n_pathways")

# Convert into factors for the plot
counts_table <- counts_table %>%
  mutate(
    Condition = factor(Condition,
                       levels = c("Acid","Temp","PFOS","AcidTemp",
                                  "AcidPFOS","PFOSTemp","APT")),
    omics = factor(omics,
                   levels = c("Transcriptomics","Metabolomics","Lipidomics")),
    category = factor(category,
                      levels = c("Amino acid metabolism",
                                 "Carbohydrate metabolism",
                                 "Cellular processes",
                                 "Cofactors & vitamins",
                                 "Energy metabolism",
                                 "Glycan biosynthesis",
                                 "Immunity & infection",
                                 "Lipid metabolism",
                                 "Nucleotide metabolism",
                                 "Other",
                                 "Protein homeostasis",
                                 "Signal transduction",
                                 "Transcription & DNA",
                                 "Xenobiotic metabolism"
                                 ))
  )

# Check
cat("Total entries Condition × Category × Omics:", nrow(counts_table), "\n\n")
cat("Omics distribution:\n")
print(table(counts_table$omics))

cat("\nTop categories per total number of pathways:\n")
counts_table %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(n_pathways), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  print()
```

## Plot construction

```{r figure6_crossomics_bubble_plot}

p_fig6 <- ggplot(counts_table,
                 aes(x = omics, y = category, size = n_pathways,
                     fill = omics)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, colour = "grey20", alpha = 0.85) +
  facet_grid(. ~ Condition, switch = "x") +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name = "Number of\nenriched pathways",
    range = c(2, 9),
    breaks = c(1, 3, 5, 10, 15)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Omics layer",
    values = c("Transcriptomics" = "#7F77DD",
               "Metabolomics"    = "#1D9E75",
               "Lipidomics"      = "#D85A30")
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +   # Carbohydrate en haut
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
theme(
  panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  panel.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "lines"),
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
  strip.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
  strip.placement = "outside",
  strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey95", colour = NA),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.box = "horizontal",
  legend.text = element_text(size = 18),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 20),
  panel.border = element_rect(colour = "grey80", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.3)
) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5)),
    size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = "grey50", colour = "grey20"))
  )

p_fig6

ggsave("Figure6_crossomics_integration.pdf",
       p_fig6,
       width = 16, height = 10,    # avant: 20 × 9
       units = "in", dpi = 300)

ggsave("Figure6_crossomics_integration.png",
       p_fig6,
       width = 20, height = 9,
       units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

## Figure check

```{r}
# Top entries perpathways numbers
counts_table %>%
  arrange(desc(n_pathways)) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  print()
```

## Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
